title: cystea regia
intro: Cystea regia, also known as Queen's Cup, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Bignoniaceae family, characterized by its unique shape and medicinal properties. The plant is traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. Cystea regia has been found to offer several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other remedies for medicinal purposes.
